title: DataStreamSemanticType
content:
# DataStreamSemanticType


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Semantic Type was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Semantic Type.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Semantic Type.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Semantic Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, name, title, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Semantic Type was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Semantic Type.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Semantic Type.

updated.description: UTC time when any Semantic Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
